category_sources: Official Sourceware Device-mapper page says userspace code includes dmsetup and libdevmapper and is required by LVM2.
source_facts.description: userspace library and tools for logical volume management.
display_name_sources: Official Sourceware page title is Device-mapper Resource Page.
docs_sources: Official Sourceware Device-mapper page documents releases, source code, and documentation notes.
Official Sourceware LVM2 page documents the maintained source and man-page documentation for dmsetup/libdevmapper.
repo_sources: Official Sourceware Device-mapper page says dmsetup and libdevmapper userspace code is maintained alongside LVM2.
Official Sourceware LVM2 page says the git source code moved to https://gitlab.com/lvmteam/lvm2.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies logical volume management tools and library.
source_facts.executables lists dmsetup and related device-mapper tools.
